meaning: n.吠陀梵语(早期梵文之一种)adj.吠陀的
examples: The Vedic calendar is based on cosmic cycles, or Yugas.
Vedic Mantras are chanted according to the intonation given in the Vedas.
Theosophy, an approach to transform vedic knowledge into western thinking.
It is a surprise that Miss Czech Republic was not asked to expand on her interest in "Vedic philosophy".
Vedic, 110 miles southeast of Des Moines, is where 3, 000 of the Maharishi's followers live and study at something called the Maharishi University of Management.
